column1: # VCEP PVS1 canonical-splice strength overrides (per gene, per SKIPPED exon).
# Rows whose first column starts with '#' are ignored. Each active row overrides
# the flat per-gene canonical-splice default in vcep_pvs1.py for variants that
# skip the named exon (donor in intron n skips exon n; acceptor in intron n
# Every entry below was verified against data/GRCh38/vcep_pvs1_exons.tsv
# (generated by scripts/build_vcep_pvs1_exons.py from MANE v1.5): the exon
# numbering matches VEP, and the in-frame / %-protein columns there agree with
# each VCEP decision-tree rationale. strength: very_strong|strong|moderate|
# supporting|na. Exons not listed keep the gene's flat default (usually PVS1).
# DICER1 (NM_177438): in-frame exon skips. exon10 >10%->Strong; 5/15/18/22 <10%->Mod; exon27 final->Mod
# CDKL5 (NM_001323289): in-frame exons 7/10/13 stay PVS1 (default); exon17 limited evidence->Mod; exon18 final->Strong
# PAH (NM_000277): in-frame exons 1/9/10 preserve frame->Strong; exon13 (last)->Strong
# ABCD1 (NM_000033): in-frame exon1 (>10%)->Strong, exon9 (<10%)->Moderate; exon10 (last, escape, >10%)->Strong
# GAA (NM_000152): in-frame catalytic-barrel exons 6/9 (P/LP)->Strong; in-frame <10% exons 17/19/20->Moderate
